{{Infobox icon
| name = Arelius crest
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Arelius crest is the official symbol of [[House Arelius]], an ancient clan that once ruled much of the [[Rosegold continent]] under the leadership of the late [[Monarch Tiberian Arelius]]. The current emblem consists of a crescent moon positioned next to two specific characters from the old language that signify power. This symbol is frequently displayed on the clothing of family members, such as on the back of jackets or robes, and is also found on banners, architectural features like doorframes, and various family heirlooms. The crest was adapted from the personal emblem of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], the clan's original Patriarch and a renowned [[Soulsmith]]. Additionally, some historical variations or related symbols include the crest of the founder, [[Ozriel]], which is depicted as a [[scythe]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Arelius crest]] is sewn in white on the back of a jacket.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Arelius family]] symbol is a crescent moon next to two symbols in the old language that indicate power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A symbol in the [[labyrinth]] resembled the [[Arelius family]] crest but with differences.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Arelius family]] crest is located on the far wall of the room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Arelius family]] crest is over a large doorframe.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
